title: Rubus latifrons
taxonomy: Rubus latifrons is classified as a species within the genus Rubus, which is a group of bramble plants in the Rosaceae family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and genetic relationships with other species in the genus. Rubus latifrons is further classified as a member of the subgenus Rubus, which contains many species of bramble plants. The subgenus Rubus is part of the Rosoideae subfamily, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Rubus latifrons is native to tropical Africa, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
